reauth_confirm.title: Update OpenTelemetry authentication
reauth_confirm.description: Update the OTLP connection settings to restore metric export.

data_description.endpoint: URL of the OTLP receiver (e.g., http://localhost:4317 for gRPC, http://localhost:4318/v1/metrics for HTTP)
data_description.protocol: Transport protocol to use for sending metrics
data_description.auth_header: Optional Bearer token or API key for authentication

reconfigure.title: Update OpenTelemetry export settings
reconfigure.description: Update the OTLP connection settings used for metric export.

data_description.endpoint: URL of the OTLP receiver (e.g., http://localhost:4317 for gRPC, http://localhost:4318/v1/metrics for HTTP)
data_description.protocol: Transport protocol to use for sending metrics
data_description.auth_header: Optional Bearer token or API key for authentication

user.title: Configure OpenTelemetry export
user.description: Set up metric export to an OpenTelemetry Collector.

data_description.endpoint: URL of the OTLP receiver (e.g., http://localhost:4317 for gRPC, http://localhost:4318/v1/metrics for HTTP)
data_description.protocol: Transport protocol to use for sending metrics
data_description.auth_header: Optional Bearer token or API key for authentication

export_failed.title: OpenTelemetry metric export is failing
export_failed.description: Metric export to {endpoint} has failed {failure_count} times in a row. Check collector availability, protocol selection, endpoint path, and authentication header. The repair issue will clear automatically after exports succeed again.

invalid_auth.title: OpenTelemetry authentication failed
invalid_auth.description: The OTLP endpoint rejected the configured authentication header. Open the integration and update the connection settings to restore metric export.

init.title: OpenTelemetry export options
init.description: Configure which entity domains to export and how often.

data_description.domains: Select which entity domains should have their states exported as metrics
data_description.export_interval: How often to push collected metrics to the collector
